title: Region-B SMS workflow assessed against a Region-A privacy requirement pack

jurisdiction_definitions.Region-A: Synthetic test jurisdiction. Applies only to data subjects located in Region-A. No legal interpretation is implied.
jurisdiction_definitions.Region-B: Synthetic test jurisdiction, separate and non-overlapping with Region-A.

requirements.title: Retain prior consent for promotional SMS to Region-A data subjects
requirements.description: Promotional SMS directed at data subjects located in Region-A requires retained prior consent and a documented withdrawal process. This requirement is limited to Region-A data subjects and confers no obligation for other jurisdictions.

practice_records.purpose: Promotional SMS for Region-B retail subscribers
practice_records.consent_method: Double opt-in confirmed by reply keyword
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-REGION-B-SMS-EXPORT-2026-07: opt-in keyword and timestamp retained per contact
practice_records.opt_out_process: STOP keyword honored; suppression list checked before every send
